disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Continuous involuntary dribbling of urine day and night that he cannot control
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the leaking of urine.
Is the leaking constant or does it come and go?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It just leaks out all the time now, day and night. I can't stop it — we've been using towels because it never stops.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Massive lower-abdominal swelling that is NOT painful despite its size
trigger_question_examples: Is the swollen belly sore or painful?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: That's the strange thing — it's swollen up huge but it doesn't really hurt at all. It's tight but not painful.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Long-standing weak, hesitant urinary stream neglected for more than two years
trigger_question_examples: Have you had trouble passing urine before this?
What has your urine stream been like over the last couple of years?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: For a couple of years now it's been hard to get started and the stream is weak and dribbly, but I never went to anyone about it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New onset over 48 hours of severe nausea, complete loss of appetite and profound fatigue, now bedbound
trigger_question_examples: How have you been feeling in yourself over the last day or two?
Are you able to eat and drink?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The last day or two I've been so sick and tired I can't eat a thing and I can barely get out of bed. I just feel dreadful.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Both lower legs have become swollen over the past week
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any swelling anywhere else, like your legs?
Any changes in your legs or ankles?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, both my legs and ankles have puffed up over the last week or so.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Has taken no medications and avoided all medical care for years out of fear
trigger_question_examples: When did you last see a doctor?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I don't take anything. I've stayed away from doctors for years — I was scared of what they'd find.
